description_long: This object is a single-story building with a wide, rectangular footprint and a prominent, dark gray sloped roof. The front facade features a series of evenly spaced wooden columns supporting an overhanging roof, creating a sheltered walkway. The structure includes a mix of stone and wood materials, with stonework visible on the lower portions of the side walls and wood framing around the doors and windows. The building has a chimney protruding from the roof, suggesting it may have an interior fireplace or stove. The rear of the building is simpler, with a plain wall and minimal detailing. The overall design is reminiscent of a rustic train station or pavilion, with functional and decorative elements suited for public or semi-public urban use.
description: A rectangular, single-story building with a dark sloped roof, wooden columns, and stone accents, resembling a rustic station or pavilion.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full length of the building, highlighting the wooden columns, overhanging roof, and main entrance area.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the sloped roof, stonework on the lower wall, and a side entrance.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a plain wall with minimal features and the full width of the roof.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the stonework, a side door, and the chimney on the roof.
